label_verbatim: (Name of Limited Liability Partnership as it appears on the record of the Secretary of State)
rationale: Current legal name of the LLP as recorded with the SOS — subject of the restated certificate.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the limited liability partnership has been changed to (if no change, so indicate)
rationale: New LLP name; per MLLP-9 convention 'no change' is the literal sentinel when the name is not being amended. Must contain 'Limited Liability Partnership', 'L.L.P.', or 'LLP' suffix per 31 MRSA §803-A when populated with a real name.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date of filing of the initial certificate of limited liability partnership was
rationale: Date the original LLP certificate was filed with the SOS. Reuses the MBCA-11 key (originally documented for 'articles of incorporation' but the schema_gap note explicitly anticipates use on amendment-style filings; LLP 'certificate' terminology shares the underlying concept).

label_verbatim: SECOND (continued): The name under which it was originally filed was:
rationale: LLP's name at the time of the original certificate filing (pre-restatement). Distinct from entity.name (current name) and amendment.new_entity_name (the post-restatement name, if changing).
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; enum_select value 'commercial'.
Maine SOS Commercial Registered Agent (CRA) public registration number.
Name (commercial path). Filler convention: write registered_agent.name to whichever slot (Text6 or Text7) matches the selected registered_agent.type.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; enum_select value 'noncommercial'.
Name (noncommercial path).

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical-location address of the registered agent (single combined widget; not split into street/city components).
Optional mailing address of the registered agent.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The name and business, residence or mailing address of the contact partner is: Name
rationale: Name of the LLP's designated contact partner (same key family as MLLP-9).
Address of the contact partner; single combined widget (no street/city split).

label_verbatim: SIXTH: Other provisions of this restated certificate, if any, that the partners determine to include are set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto and made a part hereof.
rationale: Single-letter exhibit reference for additional restated-certificate provisions. Reuses the MBCA-6/MLPA-6 key family (additional_provisions on a formation-style filing — the restated certificate is structurally a re-formation document).
Signing date of the restated certificate.

label_verbatim: Partner(s)* — slot 1 — (signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity for individual partner signer slot 1. New per-officer multi-slot pattern: partner_N.* mirrors MLPA-6's general_partner_N.* but uses 'partner' for LLP terminology (since LLPs do not have 'general partners' per 31 MRSA Ch 13). Wet-ink (signature) line has no AcroForm widget.

label_verbatim: Partner(s)* — slot 2 — (signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity for individual partner signer slot 2.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s)* which are Entities — slot 1 — Name of Entity
rationale: Name of an entity-partner signer (slot 1). Parallel block to partner_N.* for cases where the partner is itself a corporation/LLC/LP rather than an individual.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s)* which are Entities — slot 1 — By ___ (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of entity-partner slot 1.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s)* which are Entities — slot 2 — Name of Entity
rationale: Name of entity-partner slot 2.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s)* which are Entities — slot 2 — By ___ (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of entity-partner slot 2.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [2]
rationale: Cover-letter row 2.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($80 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
Filing-contact name.
Filing-contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

rationale: Annual-report reminder email (distinct from filing.contact.email).
Recipient name.
